data.description: Remove the 32pt bottom status bar entirely and relocate its only tenant — the Jump-to-Latest-Unread button — into the sidebar footer next to the help (?) button as a compact bell icon with badge. Supersedes the chrome-strip approach from CMUX-36: the sidebar footer is where operator-facing utility buttons already live, and consolidating there reclaims 32pt of vertical space for the terminal. Icon-only (no text label), keep the unread-count badge, keep the disabled-when-zero state, keep the AppDelegate.jumpToLatestUnread() wiring. Tooltip + accessibilityLabel carry the localized description now that the label is gone.
data.title: Remove bottom status bar; move Jump-to-Latest-Unread into sidebar footer

data.note: Removes the bottom status bar that CMUX-36 introduced; consolidates its only tenant into the sidebar footer.

data.body: Plan drafted at .lattice/plans/task_01KPXXBJ4DD2K3P51SKH2D24GA.md. Recommends icon-only bell in sidebar footer between help (?) and UpdatePill, deleting BottomStatusBarView + JumpToUnreadStatusBarButton outright, keeping existing xcstrings keys to reuse all six translations. Three-commit sequence (add sidebar button, remove bottom mount, delete dead files). Awaiting operator review before moving to planned.
Implementation complete. PR #64 opened: https://github.com/Stage-11-Agentics/c11/pull/64. Three commits: add sidebar button, remove bottom bar mount, delete dead files. Ready for review.
Reviewed and approved by operator. PR #64 merged into main (commit squashed, branch deleted). PR #63 (prerequisite CLI fix for surface-metadata env default) also merged. Feature shipped.
